title: Off the Grid
desc: Alexandra embarks on a thrilling journey, exploring Tsomoriri and the Baralacha Pass. On visiting Korzok village, she talks with the local residents and dresses up in traditional Ladakhi attire.

desc: Tara explores Valletta and Vittoriosa, visiting its various historical monuments, the Barraka Garden and the Grand Harbour.

desc: Once a fishing village and now a mega town full of sky scrapers and modern high rise buildings. The biggest emirate of the United Arab Emirates, Dubai.

title: Off the Grid
desc: Alexandra explores the rugged region of Leh, visiting Thiksey Monastery, Leh Palace and later Shanti Stupa. The next day she sets out for a five-hour drive to the picturesque Pangong Lake.
